overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic high-rise terrace. The scene transitions from a covered walkway to an open balcony overlooking the dense Night City skyline, then along a neon-lit seating area with other characters relaxing, and finally into an interior corridor with a reflective water feature.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered terrace walkway with a glass canopy overhead. The camera moves forward past concrete planters with palm trees and a bank of futuristic vending machines on the right. The polished marble floor reflects the mixed lighting as the player approaches the open edge of the building.

camera pans right to survey the futuristic cityscape and skyscrapers

elevated transit track or highway structure running between buildings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an exposed balcony with a glass railing, revealing a stunning view of the futuristic city. The camera pans right to show towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and holographic billboards under bright midday sun. The space is open and airy with no other people present.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony with panoramic city views

events.description: continuing to pan right revealing additional skyscrapers and building details

agents.ego_description: surveying the cityscape while moving along the balcony edge

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive 05 signage near the top
curved elevated transportation track winding between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right along the balcony, showcasing different angles of the dense urban environment. A prominent skyscraper with a 05 logo becomes visible, along with curved elevated transit tracks. The city stretches into the hazy distance with layers of buildings creating a deep urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale terrace lounge with neon signage and seating

events.description: turning from open balcony view toward interior terrace seating area with neon lights
passing by groups of seated patrons in curved lounge chairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace seating area past patrons relaxing in futuristic curved chairs

man in dark suit sitting and drinking at the terrace edge

entered.detail: large building facade with animated pink and blue neon checkered pattern and 3MOUTHS 1DESIRE text
luxurious curved benches with gold trim and brown leather upholstery
groups of people relaxing in the lounge chairs enjoying the view

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the city view to reveal a stylish terrace lounge with a massive neon sign reading 3MOUTHS 1DESIRE. The area features curved gold-trimmed seating where several patrons are relaxing. The camera moves past people sitting in futuristic chairs, with the glass railing now visible to the right overlooking the city below.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior terrace corridor with reflective water feature

events.description: moving from outdoor terrace seating to interior corridor with water feature
turning to face the entrance area with glass walls and interior lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing through the terrace interior past additional seating and a reflective water pool

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a more enclosed interior corridor featuring a reflective water pool with neon lighting on the right. The camera passes additional banquet seating where a couple is conversing, then turns toward the entrance area. Glass walls with teal neon accents line the space, creating a sophisticated atmosphere as the walk continues toward the interior entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered high-rise walkway out onto an expansive urban balcony before retreating into a sophisticated interior lounge. It begins under a glass canopy, moving past concrete planters and futuristic vending machines across a polished marble floor. As the camera emerges onto an exposed balcony, the space opens up to a bright midday panorama of towering skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and curved transit tracks stretching into a hazy urban canyon. The view then shifts away from the skyline toward a stylish terrace lounge, passing under a massive neon sign and gold-trimmed seating where patrons relax. Finally, the scene transitions into an enclosed corridor, gliding past a reflective neon water pool and teal-accented glass walls toward the interior entrance.
